nasb.text: You will be filled with drunkenness and sorrow, The cup of horror and desolation, The cup of your sister Samaria.

esv.text: you will be filled with drunkenness and sorrow. A cup of horror and desolation, the cup of your sister Samaria;

cnv.text: 你必酩酊大醉，充滿愁苦， 那是驚慌和荒涼的杯， 就是你姊姊撒瑪利亞的杯。

ccb.text: 你姐姐撒玛利亚的杯盛满了恐惧和凄凉。 你喝了后必酩酊大醉， 满心忧愁。
